---
title: "Problem Sets"
subtitle: "Problems sets are your opportunity to work on the skills discussed in class."
---

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="60%"}

### Problem Set Due Dates

-   Problem Set #1: July 8th
-   Problem Set #2: July 10th
-   Problem Set #3: July 15th
-   Problem Set #4: July 17th
-   Problem Set #5: Nov. 22nd

Problem sets are completed individually. Each includes a data file and a starter R script. Download both, complete your work in RStudio, and submit your rendered `.html` Quarto file by **11:59pm** on the due date.

Please submit all files [HERE](https://niuits-my.sharepoint.com/:f:/g/personal/a1837136_mail_niu_edu/IgAyO02TtbQ_SZ1nIsckE0MSAfq8zKULBddf7N0KzuYouLk). Label your file with pset#\_name (ie pset1_colin.html)

:::

::: {.column width="40%"}

![](images/rmug.jpg)

:::

::::
